creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Poul-Henning Kamp from comment #3)

No secret handshakes to speak of, just a QA'd patch that is reviewed by a ports committer

The current patch (attachment 217464) looks fine

If you're not comfortable merging it to the quarterly branch (/usr/ports/Tools/scripts/mfh 2020Q3 <revision>) just me know and I can take care of that for you.
